_doc: Task #580 candidate-feature spec. Each entry is a deterministic, point-in-time, real-data-only transform of columns already present in the persisted training-frame snapshots under `artifacts/ml-engine/models/datasets/<tf>_<ts>.parquet`. The runner (`scripts/feature_edge_search/run_search.py`) walks this list, applies the named transform per row, and runs walk-forward LightGBM ablation per timeframe. Cross-checked against `shared/forbidden-features.json`: NO entry has a name beginning with any forbidden prefix; NO entry consumes a column derived from LLM/news/sentiment/social.

candidates.name: vol_of_vol_30
candidates.math: rolling 30-bar standard deviation of `realizedVol`, computed strictly on rows with timestamp_ms <= row.timestamp_ms (window expanding-then-trailing).
candidates.rationale: Captures regime instability — high vol-of-vol periods typically have less reliable directional structure, low vol-of-vol periods are quieter and may admit predictable mean-reversion.

candidates.name: realizedVol_log
candidates.rationale: Tames the realizedVol heavy tail so the booster can split on the log-scale magnitude without one extreme bar dominating the leaf split.

candidates.name: ret1_squared
candidates.rationale: Local volatility surrogate. Decoupling magnitude from direction lets the booster learn `large move at all` separately from `up vs down`.

candidates.name: ret5_minus_ret10
candidates.rationale: Momentum-divergence: positive when the most recent 5 bars accelerate vs the 10-bar baseline.

candidates.name: rsi14_centered_squared
candidates.rationale: RSI extremity magnitude (overbought OR oversold). Directionless reversal-pressure proxy.

candidates.name: bb_pctb_extreme
candidates.rationale: Distance from the Bollinger middle as a fraction of the band width. Magnitude-only band-edge proximity signal.

candidates.name: macd_hist_norm_atr
candidates.rationale: ATR-normalized MACD histogram. Removes the absolute-price scale so the booster can compare a 1c MACD jiggle on PEPE vs a $50 jiggle on RNDR fairly.

candidates.name: vol_zscore60_squared
candidates.rationale: Spike-strength magnitude. Existing volZScore60 column gives the signed deviation; the square gives the unsigned shock size.

candidates.name: ema_spread_per_atr
candidates.rationale: Trend-strength normalized by realized volatility. A large EMA spread is only `meaningful trend` if it dwarfs the typical bar range.

candidates.name: atr_pct_zscore_60
candidates.math: (atrPct - rolling_mean(atrPct, 60)) / max(rolling_std(atrPct, 60), 1e-9). Strict trailing window; first 60 rows per (coin, tf) are NaN-filled with 0.
candidates.rationale: Volatility regime indicator computed point-in-time per coin. Independent of `volZScore60` (which uses |ret1|).

candidates.name: drawdown_30
candidates.rationale: Local drawdown magnitude (always <= 0). Captures `how far below recent peak` independent of absolute price.

candidates.name: btc_lead_x_self_ret
candidates.rationale: Cross-coin alignment: positive when BTC's recent move agrees with the target coin's last bar direction. Feature-lab task #517 added volZScore60 in isolation; this is the natural cross-coin sibling.

candidates.name: eth_lead_minus_btc_lead
candidates.rationale: BTC vs ETH dispersion: positive when ETH leads BTC, often a risk-on tell for alts.

candidates.name: macd_signal_cross_strength
candidates.rationale: Signed cross-strength: combines direction (line above/below signal) with magnitude (histogram). Reduces the booster's need to find this interaction by tree splits.

candidates.name: ret1_x_volZ60
candidates.rationale: Direction × shock magnitude. A 1% move during a vol-spike episode often persists differently than the same 1% move in a quiet regime.

candidates.name: log_liquidations_self
candidates.math: log1p(liquidations_1h_usd). Falls back to 0 when source column is NaN/missing.
candidates.rationale: Liquidation pressure on the target coin. Real-data-only — uses an already-ingested column. Note: column is mostly zero in current snapshots; ablation will measure whether the non-zero tail carries any lift.
